reference: Your symptoms are mostly due to cervical spine disorders. You should have an X-ray of the cervical vertebrae and an MRI if the X-ray is normal. Start with a vitamin B12 injection once every three days.
text: Your symptoms are mostly due to cervical spine disorders. You should have an X-ray of the cervical vertebrae and an MRI. The X-ray is normal. Start with a vitamin B twelve injection once every three weeks.
